name: Made in St. Louis
description: Inventions and brands born in St. Louis.

questions.hintText: Take a look inside the refrigerator in the Made in St. Louis gallery.

variants.prompt: What fizzy lemon soda was invented in St. Louis?

scan.hintText: Look for the 7Up bottle in the refrigerator display.

variants.prompt: Which of these was named by TIME magazine as one of the 20th century's "100 Greatest Things for Consumers"?

scan.prompt: Find the Reddi-Wip in the exhibit!
scan.hintText: Look for the Reddi-Wip can in the refrigerator display.

variants.prompt: What was the name of the drink mix that eventually became Pixy Stix?

scan.prompt: Find the label about SweeTarts & Pixy Stix.
scan.hintText: Look for the panel mentioning Fruzola and Pixy Stix.
